initcondition.formula: "User" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")
"User Role" IN ("Workflow:Second Level Approver 1") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User Role" IN ("Workflow:Second level Approver 2")
"User Role" IN ("Workflow:Second Level Approver 1") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User Role" IN ("Workflow:Second level Approver 2")

returnusererroraction.errortext: Reason for rejection is empty! Please go back, edit the record, enter the reason for rejection, and save the record before rejecting it.
